zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Swynfen於1418年出生在英國斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷時，她的父親William Pipe Swyfen21歲，母親Joyce de Durvassal27歲。她於1435年與Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國史洛普爾通享年42歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Swynfen于1418年出生在英国斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷时，她的父亲William Pipe Swyfen21岁，母亲Joyce de Durvassal27岁。她于1435年与Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国史洛普爾通享年42岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾通。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Swiffen

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Swynfen was born in 1418, in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England, her father, William Pipe Swyfen, was 21 and her mother, Joyce de Durvassal, was 27. She married Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight in 1435, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1460, in Tong, Shropshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Tong, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Swynfen est née en 1418, à Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Pipe Swyfen, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joyce de Durvassal, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight en 1435, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Swynfen 1418 in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pipe Swyfen 21 und ihre Mutter Joyce de Durvassal 27. Sie hat 1435 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Tong, Shropshire, England und wurde in Tong, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Swynfen è nata il nel 1418 nel Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, William Pipe Swyfen, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joyce de Durvassal, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight nel 1435, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Tong, Shropshire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Tong, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Swynfenが1418年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアピペ リドワーで生まれた時，父William Pipe Swyfenは21歳，母Joyce de Durvassalは27歳であった。1435年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルでSir William de Vernon, IV, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングで42歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアトングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Swynfen(이)가 1418년 영국 스태퍼드실르 파이프 리드워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pipe Swyfen(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce de Durvassal(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 탕에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Swynfen nasceu em 1418, em Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pipe Swyfen, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de Durvassal, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight em 1435, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Swynfen родилась в 1418 г. в местности паип ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Pipe Swyfen было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joyce de Durvassal, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight в 1435 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Swynfen nació en 1418, en Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pipe Swyfen, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joyce de Durvassal, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight en 1435, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
